items.name: Hergondran
items.description:
Hergondran, the Black Dragon, is a massive and imposing creature cloaked in shadow. His obsidian-black scales shimmer faintly with dark iridescence, as if absorbing all light around him. His piercing purple eyes glow with an eerie, otherworldly intensity, exuding a dark and ancient intelligence.
